description: Questo sub-concetto si riferisce alle sensazioni residue che persistono dopo il contatto, come un pizzicore o una sensazione di tensione (positivo) rispetto all'assenza di sensazioni residue (negativo).
positive: A tingling sensation lingers on my forearm, a faint *picor* like static electricity.
My fingertips retain a subtle *pizzicore* after touching the cool metal.
The residual *Kribbeln* in my jawbone reminds me of the pressure applied.
A slight *picotement* persists on my cheek, a pleasant, lingering warmth.
I feel a faint *pizzicore* in my calf muscle, a subtle echo of the stretch.
My scalp experiences a mild *pizzicore*, a gentle reminder of the contact.
A residual *tingling* remains on my palm, a pleasant, subtle vibration.
There's a *picor* in my neck, a quiet echo of the brief touch.
The *Kribbeln* in my toes fades slowly, a delicate, persistent sensation.
A soft *picotement* graces my elbow, a subtle warmth lingering.
I have a slight *pizzicore* on my inner thigh, a comforting after-effect.
The *tingling* in my shoulder blade is subtle, a quiet reminder.

I experience a slight *pizzicore* on my eyelashes, a comforting after-effect.
A subtle *tingling* graces my upper lip, a quiet, lingering warmth.
negative: Nothing remains on my skin after the contact, just a blankness.
There's no lingering sensation on my hand, simply emptiness.
My fingers feel completely neutral, no trace of the touch.
Absolutely no *sensazione* persists on my arm, just a void.
The contact left no residual feeling on my back; it’s gone.
My leg feels inert, devoid of any lingering *sensation*.
There's a complete absence of feeling in my jawline now.
No trace remains on my cheek, just a blank, neutral state.
My scalp is numb, devoid of any residual *sensazione*.
The touch vanished completely, leaving no sensation behind.
